articles.title: The new Rogue Trooper movie poster looks like it fell out of a ’70s cinema
Designing Stable Interfaces For Streaming Content
articles.summary: Streaming UIs are an easy concept on the surface, but are quite complicated in practice. There are many considerations that need to be accounted for, from layout shifts and motion preferences to proper markup and various states, that may not be instantly obvious. What happens if the stream is interrupted? Can users tab through the UI on the keyboard as it shifts? What ARIA attributes might be needed?
